title: Paper Folding Limits as Depth Transition

analysis.object: T599: Paper Folding Limits as Depth Transition depth analysis

fold_doubles_eml1.description: Each fold doubles thickness: EML-1 exponential
fold_doubles_eml1.reason: Paper folding is EML-1: thickness = t * 2^n after n folds

limit_eml2.description: Limit when thickness exceeds width: EML-2 measurement threshold
limit_eml2.reason: Folding limit is EML-2: geometric measurement of thickness vs remaining width

gallivan_formula.description: Gallivan formula extends limit: EML-2 measurement equation for required length
gallivan_formula.reason: Gallivan's insight is EML-2: measurement formula that extends EML-1 exponential

physical_limit.description: Physical limit is EML-2 measurement of EML-1 exponential; no EML-inf needed
physical_limit.reason: Paper folding stays in {1,2}: clean system without depth categorification
